reviews.review_description: This is a truely unique twist on pool where you fling an air hockey like puck at air hockey like balls but follows regular pool rules, there is standard 8 ball and snooker.  This makes for a quick game you can sink hours into, the physics are spot on, the controls felt good the bot opponent is so cute in his expressions and movements.  My only complaint is multiplayer needs some work, I told a friend about this game and when we went to play she was unable to join from my invite from the game, there is no other way to create or join a room that I could see.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the 4-star review! We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying the physics and the personality of our bot opponent—we put a lot of heart into those details.

We sincerely apologize for the trouble you and your friend had with the invite system. We want playing with friends to be as easy as the game itself, so we are excited to announce that we are adding a 'Join Room via ID' feature in our next update.

We are aiming to have this live by this Weekend, along with several other exciting additions:

New Mode: 5-Ball Pool.

New Challenge: Color Challenge in Snooker.

Progression: More achievements to unlock.

Refinement: General bug fixes to ensure a smoother experience.

Thank you for supporting Disc Pool and for helping us make the game better. We hope these updates earn that 5th star from you soon!

reviews.review_description: Enjoying the option to play while sitting or standing. The game is equally enjoyable either way, and great fun when playing either by yourself or with a friend.

App is good, but need some minor aesthetic stuff.
Remaining looks great

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the 5-star review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying Disc Pool. We definitely have some visual and UI polish on our roadmap, so stay tuned for future updates. Thanks for the support!
